settings.content: Plain paragraph. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog while a verbose narrator describes the entire scene in unnecessary detail.

First paragraph in a sequence. Tests the paragraph-to-paragraph spacing emitted by the prose utility rules.

Second paragraph follows. The gap between paragraphs should be consistent with the design-system rhythm.

Third paragraph closes the sequence.

Lead paragraph introducing a list of items below.

  • First unordered item
  • Second unordered item with longer text that may wrap to a second line
  • Third unordered item

Followed by an ordered list:

  1. Step one
  2. Step two
  3. Step three
This paragraph carries italic emphasis, bold weight, and an inline link to validate inline-element rendering inside prose.

This paragraph renders inside a narrow readable column (capped at 65ch via the prose:narrow modifier). Width is enforced regardless of the parent's content width. Useful for long-form body copy where line length affects readability.
This block carries 64px desktop top margin (0px on mobile). Validate the breakpoint swap by resizing across 768px.
